narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 5-B (precinct in Scioto County) has 393 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
